buildCommand: python3 generate_station.py PAD > station-live.html && python3 generate_station.py KGX > station-kgx.html && python3 generate_station.py MAN > station-man.html && python3 generate_station.py BRI > station-bri.html && python3 generate_station.py EDB > station-edb.html && python3 generate_station.py GLC > station-glc.html && echo 'Build complete'
